SUBJECT: Last chance for gluttony...

NAME,

OK, this is your last chance for commission gluttony on the SMARTS gravy train.

We've had tons of affiliates raking in huge commissions for seven days already.

Now you get one more chance - but this one's only going to last for 24 hours.

We're re-opening SMARTS at 2:00pm eastern today... but only for 24 hours.

We ROLLED BACK the price to our original launch price, so your list will save $600.00.

AND... and we're giving away another MacBook Air to the affiliate that makes the most sales in this final 24 hour period.

So here's your affiliate link, you know what to
do:

http://  AFF LINK


I've included fresh swipe copy below...


best regards,
Tom Ham

SUBJECT: last best hope...

NAME,

Last week StomperNet got a little crazy.

In fact, they pulled the rug right out from under a bunch of people.

Without warning, they pulled their brand-new SMARTS thingie off the market. One minute it was there, the next minute it was gone.

No last chance, no "two-minute warning". Just gone.

I guess they had some site called "scribd.com"
that was blaming their "No Secrets" video for sending too many Internet Marketers to their site... and Stomper got a little worried and pulled down SMARTS.

Actually, there's a big long complicated story about this... but the bottom line is that the StomperNet folks figured out that they acted a little too quickly when they pulled SMARTS of the market.

In other words, they should have warned people first. I guess the heat in their inbox got a little bit intense.  ;-)

So they are doing a limited 24 hour re-open.

And get this -

As a "make good", they are turning back their price to the original discounted price.

In other words, you can save $600.00.

But you have to act now - SMARTS re-opens at 2:00pm eastern on Monday, January 21... and it's only going to be open for 24 hours.

Here's the link:

http:// AFF LINK


best regards,
AFF NAME
